hooks.command: filepath=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); case "$filepath" in */.env|*/.env.local|*/.env.production|*/.env.staging) echo '\n[HOOK BLOCKED] Cannot edit .env files directly — update .env.example instead and copy manually.' >&2; exit 1;; esac
